Here’s the plan I’m working through now:

1. Mirror the real runtime in `.storybook/preview.tsx`
   `src/core-ui/index.css`, router context, seeded `sessionStorage`, frozen date, and global MSW handlers for the Airtable/captcha fetches.

2. Make Storybook safe for the auth/contact flows
   keep browser APIs real, but replace the external ReCAPTCHA widget with a Storybook-only component so those pages render consistently in browser tests.

3. Add real app stories
   target about 10 colocated story files built from actual page/component usage: shell pieces like navigation/CTA/newsletter plus page-level routes like landing, pricing, blog, contact, sign-in, and profile.

4. Verify the setup end to end
   run `tsc`, then run Storybook Vitest screenshot checks against the stories I added and tighten the preview setup until they render cleanly without per-story fetch hacks.

I’ve got the runtime map now, and the only thing that needs a Storybook-only shim is the external ReCAPTCHA widget. I’m moving into edits next: wiring the preview environment, adding MSW/env support in `.storybook`, and then dropping in colocated stories that follow the real route/component usage.

Storybook now uses a shared app-like runtime from [.storybook/preview.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/.storybook/preview.tsx#L1) and [.storybook/main.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/.storybook/main.ts#L1): real root CSS, router context, seeded `sessionStorage`, frozen date with `mockdate`, global MSW handlers in [.storybook/msw-handlers.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/.storybook/msw-handlers.ts#L1), Storybook-only env/static asset setup, and a local ReCAPTCHA shim in [.storybook/MockReCAPTCHA.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/.storybook/MockReCAPTCHA.tsx#L1) so auth/contact flows render without per-story hacks. I also limited story discovery to real component/route stories and added [tsconfig.json](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/tsconfig.json#L1) so `tsc` can check the Storybook files.

I added 10 colocated story files based on real app usage: [Navigation.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/src/components/navigation/Navigation.stories.tsx#L1), [Footer.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/src/components/footer/Footer.stories.tsx#L1), [Cta.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/src/components/cta/Cta.stories.tsx#L1), [Newsletter.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/src/components/Newsletter.stories.tsx#L1), [Landing.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/src/routes/landing/Landing.stories.tsx#L1), [Pricing.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/src/routes/pricing/Pricing.stories.tsx#L1), [Blog.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/src/routes/blog/Blog.stories.tsx#L1), [Contact.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/src/routes/contact/Contact.stories.tsx#L1), [SignIn.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/src/routes/sign-in/SignIn.stories.tsx#L1), and [Profile.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-05-40Z-596005b5/project/src/routes/user-profile/Profile.stories.tsx#L1).

Verification passed with `npx tsc --noEmit` and `STORYBOOK_FAIL_ON_EMPTY_RENDER=true STORYBOOK_TEST_SCREENSHOTS=true npx vitest --project storybook ...`: 10 story files passed and 16 tests passed.
